intent_head: Whose birthday is coming up next? If multiple people share that next birthday date, list all of them. Return only the exact names, one per line, sorted alphabetically.

function.rulebook_notes: Used root AGENTS.MD plus nested entity rulebooks; treated cast files as authoritative for birthdays and exact identity; anchored 'coming up next' to today's date from context (2026-03-31).
function.outcome_justification: Authoritative birthday search across 10_entities/cast showed the earliest upcoming birthday after 2026-03-31 is 04-25, and reading 10_entities/cast/claudia.md confirmed the exact canonical name Claudia Reiter. No other birthday in the search results falls between 03-31 and 04-25 or shares 04-25.
